Notice Of Motion For Application For A Stay Of Action Pending Arbitration;
Off Calendar May-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Application for A Stay of Action Pending Arbitration is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling is adopted.
